Internal Audit Findings — 2023: The annual internal audit identified three medium-severity findings and one low-severity finding across the finance and procurement functions. The most significant finding relates to inconsistent approval workflows for purchase orders exceeding $50,000 in the APAC region. Management has agreed to remediate all findings by March 31, 2024, with interim controls in place immediately. The external auditors have been informed and will validate remediation during the Q1 2024 review.
